case_title: UNIVERSAL BANK, A CHARTERED BANK OF THE STATE OF VS. PETER J O'NEILL

docket_entries.description: PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 3/28/03 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
